rulings.Case Title: SAN PABLO SR2, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. SPARX7, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 18, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to May 16, 2022 for Plaintiff to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the opposition no later than 9:00 a.m. on April 19, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting hew hearing date. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 18, 2022 line 2. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING REFEREE is GRANTED, in part. rulings.Case Title: HOMERISESF VS. DANA BETINIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 18, 2022 line 3. DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. (CCP Section 438(e).) Section 438(e) authorizes the trial court to permit late filings of such motions, but no request was made here. Further, Defendant failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 18, 2022 line 6. DEFENDANT KEELEY BROOKS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff is not required to attach a copy of the lease as the action is based solely on CCP Section 1161(2). The complaint is not uncertain as to the role of Plaintiff Kadleck and Plaintiff need not allege when the rent was increased. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
